# Infrastructure Authority Map

**Version:** 1.0
**Phase:** 9F
**Status:** Proposed — pending reconciliation with actual state

---

## Authority Assignments

### vm-claude-hub (192.168.0.191) — Moreno AI Core

**Authority:** Everything Moreno AI owns.

```
Moreno-AI repository (persistent working copy)
n8n governance router + Sentinel runtime
Gitea source of truth
GitHub bridge (claude-poller)
Agent files (SOUL.md, MEMORY.md, JOURNAL.md — all agents)
Runtime files (agent_identity_loader, memory_runtime, journal_runtime)
Phase 9A audit records (/opt/moreno-ai/audit/)
Shared memory store (/opt/moreno-ai/memory/)
Governance documents
Constitution
cloudflared (primary replica)
```

**Services to keep here:**
- n8n (governance orchestration — stays here per ChatGPT recommendation)
- Gitea
- claude-poller / claude-bridge
- cloudflared (primary)

**Migration required:** Moreno-AI repo from /tmp to /opt/moreno-ai or /home/jose/moreno-ai

---

### vm-mcp-services (192.168.0.204) — Tool Layer

**Authority:** External tool integrations only.

```
filesystem-mcp (already running)
future: GitHub MCP
future: Memory MCP (external tools)
future: Playwright MCP
future: PostgreSQL (tool data)
future: Redis (tool cache)
Portainer (container management)
Traefik (reverse proxy for MCP services)
```

**NOT on this VM:**
- Governance runtime
- Agent files
- Audit records (those are on vm-claude-hub)
- n8n (orchestration — not tooling)

---

### vm-openclaw (192.168.0.199) — Remy Runtime

**Authority:** Remy / OpenClaw agent exclusively.

```
OpenClaw runtime (user systemd)
Nginx (webhook proxy)
socat webhook forwarder
Remy's live SOUL.md (at /home/jose/.openclaw/workspace/)
```

**Current issue:** 44% disk usage — remove /home/jose/google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb

---

### vm-hermes (192.168.0.202) — Sakura Runtime

**Authority:** Sakura / Hermes agent exclusively.

```
Hermes gateway (webhook:8080)
Hermes API (port 7600)
Sakura's live SOUL.md (at /home/jose/.hermes/SOUL.md)
```

**Current issue:** hermes-mcp.service in auto-restart loop — investigate and fix

---

### vm-dashboard (192.168.0.201) — Mission Control

**Authority:** Observability and monitoring.

```
Homepage dashboard
Uptime Kuma
Wetty SSH terminals (all VMs)
cloudflared (second replica)
```

**Future (not yet built):**
```
Grafana
audit log explorer
journal explorer
agent activity monitor
```

---

### vm-nextcloud (192.168.0.198) — Knowledge Archive

**Authority:** Document storage and knowledge base.

```
Nextcloud (177GB of documents)
Google Drive sync
```

---

### vm-backups (192.168.0.192) — Backups Only

**Authority:** Backup storage exclusively.

```
Backrest (restic backend)
Agent file backups
VM snapshot coordination
```

---

### vm-vaultwarden (192.168.0.200) — Secrets Only

**Authority:** Credential management exclusively.

```
Vaultwarden (Bitwarden-compatible)
```
Jose adds entries manually. No automated writes.

---

## Open Question: n8n Location

**Current:** vm-claude-hub:5678

**Recommendation (aligned with ChatGPT):** Keep on vm-claude-hub.

Rationale: n8n hosts the Sentinel governance router. As the ecosystem grows,
n8n will become the orchestration layer for agent actions, memory events,
and governance decisions. That belongs with the Moreno AI core, not with
external tooling.

If n8n ever needs to be separated: put it on vm-claude-hub still,
but give claude-hub more resources.

---

*Authority map based on ChatGPT proposed architecture + live VM state.*
---SERVICE-INV---
# Current Service Inventory

**Version:** 1.0
**Phase:** 9F — Infrastructure Authority Reconciliation
**Verified:** Live scan — June 16 2026
**Method:** SSH inventory across all 8 active VMs

---

## CRITICAL ISSUES IDENTIFIED

### CRITICAL-1: Moreno-AI Runtime in /tmp (Ephemeral)

The Moreno-AI repository working copy lives at:
```
vm-claude-hub:/tmp/moreno-ai-setup
```

`/tmp` is ephemeral. All runtime files (agent_identity_loader.py,
memory_runtime.py, journal_runtime.py) and all agent files (SOUL.md,
MEMORY.md, etc.) will be **lost on next reboot**.

The repository itself is safe (mirrored on Gitea + GitHub), but the
working copy must be moved to a persistent location before any reboot.

**Required action:** Move to `/home/jose/moreno-ai` or `/opt/moreno-ai`

### CRITICAL-2: Audit Records on vm-claude-hub /opt

Phase 9A audit records write to:
```
vm-claude-hub:/opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/
```

This path is on vm-claude-hub, not vm-mcp-services. The MCP filesystem
service runs on vm-mcp-services but operates its own separate data path.
These two are NOT connected. The audit path needs to be confirmed and
stabilized before migration.

Current audit record count: 11 records

---

## VM Inventory

### vm-claude-hub — 192.168.0.191
**Role (actual):** Moreno AI Core + orchestration
**Disk:** 46G total, 7.6G used (18% — healthy)

| Service | Type | Port | Status | Install Path |
|---------|------|------|--------|-------------|
| n8n | systemd (native) | 5678 | Running | npm-global, ~/.n8n |
| Gitea | systemd | 3000 | Running | /home/jose/gitea/ |
| cloudflared | systemd | — | Running | /usr/bin/cloudflared |
| claude-bridge | systemd | 4000 | Running | /home/jose/claude-bridge/ |
| claude-poller | systemd | — | Running | /home/jose/claude-poller.sh |

**Key paths:**
```
/home/jose/gitea/          ← Gitea data
/home/jose/workspace/      ← working files
/home/jose/mcp-data/       ← version artifact (not audit data)
/home/jose/agent-backups-20260610/  ← old agent backup
/opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/  ← Phase 9A audit records (11 files)
/tmp/moreno-ai-setup/      ← CRITICAL: Moreno-AI repo (EPHEMERAL)
/tmp/moreno-ai-setup/runtime/  ← agent_identity_loader.py, memory_runtime.py, journal_runtime.py
/tmp/moreno-ai-setup/agents/   ← SOUL.md, MEMORY.md, JOURNAL.md for all 7 agents
```

**Repos involved:**
- Gitea: http://192.168.0.191:3000/jose/Moreno-AI
- GitHub mirror: https://github.com/itechguy2011/Moreno-AI
- GitHub bridge: https://github.com/itechguy2011/homelab-bridge

**n8n workflows:**
- chatgpt-homelab-agent-router (ID: pWnqKmUwimLYVZ5P) — 14 nodes, Sentinel active
- Agent control panel webhook (n8n.cutegrafiks.com)

---

### vm-backups — 192.168.0.192
**Role (actual):** Backups ✓ (matches proposed)
**Disk:** 46G total, 2.2G used (5%)

| Service | Type | Port | Status | Path |
|---------|------|------|--------|------|
| Backrest | systemd | 9898 | Running | /home/jose/backup.sh |

**Key paths:**
```
/home/jose/agent-backups/  ← agent file backups
```

### vm-nextcloud — 192.168.0.198
**Role (actual):** Knowledge archive ✓ (matches proposed)
**Disk:** 1TB total, 177G used (19%)

| Service | Type | Port | Status |
|---------|------|------|--------|
| Apache2 | systemd | 80 | Running |
| MariaDB | systemd | 3306 | Running (localhost only) |
| Nextcloud | via Apache | 80 | Running |
| gdrive-sync | systemd | — | Running |
| Backrest | systemd | 9898 | Running |

---

### vm-openclaw — 192.168.0.199
**Role (actual):** Remy / OpenClaw runtime ✓
**Disk:** 46G total, 19G used (**44% — watch this**)

| Service | Type | Port | Status | Notes |
|---------|------|------|--------|-------|
| OpenClaw (Remy) | user systemd | 9119 (0.0.0.0), 8787 (127.0.0.1) | Running (PID 1211) | No systemd unit file visible in system |
| Nginx | systemd | 80, 443 | Running | Proxies webhook paths |
| remy-webhook-forwarder | systemd | 8788→8787 | Running | socat forwarder |

**Remy routing chain:**
```
CF tunnel → remy.cutegrafiks.com → 192.168.0.199:8788 (socat)
           → 127.0.0.1:8787 (OpenClaw internal webhook)
```
Telegram webhook: https://remy.cutegrafiks.com/telegram-webhook (registered, no errors)

**Known issues:**
- 44% disk usage — Chrome deb package still in /home/jose (leftover, safe to remove)
- UFW rule for port 8788 was added during Phase 9E health check session
